attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
	ITEM_ID ,
	ITEM_NAME ,
	ITEM_DESCRIPTION ,
	BUSINESS_UNIT ,
	PRODUCT_FAMILY ,
	LINE_OF_BUSINESS ,
	FCS_DATE ,
	INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,
	ITEM_TYPE ,
	ITEM_STATUS ,
	SOURCE1 ,
	ERP_SPECIFIC ,
	PT_CC ,
	REQUESTOR ,
	REQUESTED_DATE ,
	MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLAG ,
	PRODUCT_FAMILY_DESCRIPTION ,
	BRAND_NAME ,
	ITEM_APPROVER ,
	ITEM_APPROVED_DATE ,
	SOFTWARE_CATEGORY ,
	BASE_PID ,
	ITEM_FLAG ,
	INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE ,
	BATCH_ID ,
	OVERRIDE_FLAG ,
	AUDITOR_COMMENTS ,
	CUSTOM_SPECIFIC ,
	GENUINE_MISMATCH ,
	CREATED_BY ,
	CREATED_DATE ,
	MODIFIED_BY ,
	MODIFIED_DATE ,
	DEACTIVATED_BY ,
	DEACTIVATED_DATE ,
	USER_INTERFACE ,
	CUSTOM_KIT_FLAG ,
	NAFTA_FLAG ,
	CREATE_DATETIME,
    ACTION_CODE,
	'RI',
	MANUAL_IMP_FLAG,
	GPL_FLAG,
    PID_STATUS,
    AUDIT_FLAG,
    KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLAG,
    DASHBOARD_FLAG,
    WORKBENCH_FLAG,
    REASON,
    REMOVED_DATE,
    DELIVERY_OPTION,
    ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
    CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS SXCI
WHERE	SOURCE1 <> 'CISCO'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SOURCE_SYSTEM NCISS
WHERE (  SXCI.SOURCE1 = NCISS.BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD )
)

SELECT
BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
COALESCE(SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,
SK_ITEM_ID_INT,
ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
COALESCE(GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,'N') AS GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
COALESCE(INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,'N') AS MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT,
DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
ITEM_DESCR,
ITEM_TYPE,
BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD,
COALESCE(ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, -999) AS ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,  
COALESCE(ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
COALESCE(RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
RU_ITEM_CLASS_CD,
COALESCE(RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
COALESCE(RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG,'N')  AS RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG,
RU_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  AS SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME,
COALESCE(SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  AS SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME,
COALESCE(RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,'UNKNOWN')  AS RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
COALESCE(BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD ,
COALESCE(BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
RU_DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
ENTERPRISE_MERGED_FLG,
COALESCE(MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,'N' ) AS MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
COALESCE(CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
COALESCE(ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
COALESCE(PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_STATUS_CD ,
COALESCE(AUDIT_FLG,'N') AS AUDIT_FLG ,
COALESCE(GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,'N') AS GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG ,
COALESCE(LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD ,
COALESCE(KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,'N') AS KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
COALESCE(DASHBOARD_FLG,'N') AS  DASHBOARD_FLG ,
COALESCE(REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD ,
COALESCE(ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT, DATE '3500-01-01') AS ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
COALESCE(DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
COALESCE(WORKBENCH_FLG,'N') AS WORKBENCH_FLG,
SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
COALESCE(SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
START_TV_DTM,
END_TV_DTM,
'I'AS ACTION_CODE,
	DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT
TV_OUT.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
TV_OUT.SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,
TV_OUT.SK_ITEM_ID_INT,
TV_OUT.ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
TV_OUT.ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
TV_OUT.GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
TV_OUT.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,
TV_OUT.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
TV_OUT.FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT,
TV_OUT.DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
TV_OUT.ITEM_DESCR,
TV_OUT.ITEM_TYPE,
TV_OUT.BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD,
TV_OUT.ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
TV_OUT.ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
TV_OUT.RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
TV_OUT.RU_ITEM_CLASS_CD,
TV_OUT.RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
TV_OUT.RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG,
TV_OUT.RU_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
TV_OUT.SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME, 
TV_OUT.SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME,
TV_OUT.RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
TV_OUT.BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
TV_OUT.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,
TV_OUT.DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
TV_OUT.RU_DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
TV_OUT.ENTERPRISE_MERGED_FLG,
TV_OUT.MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
TV_OUT.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
TV_OUT.ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
TV_OUT.PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
TV_OUT.AUDIT_FLG,
TV_OUT.GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,
TV_OUT.LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,
TV_OUT.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
TV_OUT.DASHBOARD_FLG,
TV_OUT.REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,
TV_OUT.ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
TV_OUT.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
TV_OUT.DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
TV_OUT.WORKBENCH_FLG,
TV_OUT.SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
TV_OUT.SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
TV_OUT.DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
TV_OUT.SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
TV_OUT.SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
TV_OUT.START_TV_DTM,
COALESCE (MAX(TV_OUT.START_TV_DTM - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TV_OUT.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM ORDER BY TV_OUT.START_TV_DTM ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING
				AND	1 FOLLOWING),TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS END_TV_DTM,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TV_OUT.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM ORDER	BY TV_OUT.START_TV_DTM ASC ) AS RANK_INDEX,
		(CASE	WHEN RANK_INDEX=1 AND	NICTV.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM, 
SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,
SK_ITEM_ID_INT,
ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
ITEM_APPROVED_DT, 
GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,
MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT, 
DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
ITEM_DESCR, 
ITEM_TYPE, 
BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD,  
ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
RU_ITEM_CLASS_CD, 
RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT, 
RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG, 
RU_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID, 
EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME, 
SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME,
RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,
DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
RU_DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
ENTERPRISE_MERGED_FLG,
MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
AUDIT_FLG,
GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,
LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,
KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
DASHBOARD_FLG,
REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,
ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
WORKBENCH_FLG,
SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
START_TV_DTM,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TV_IN.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
                                 TV_IN.ITEM_TYPE,
                                 TV_IN.ITEM_DESCR,
                                 TV_IN.WORKBENCH_FLG,
                                 TV_IN.SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
								 TV_IN.DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
                                 TV_IN.SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
								 TV_IN.DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
                                 TV_IN.SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
                                 TV_IN.SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID								 
                               ORDER BY TV_IN.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM								 
FROM
(
SELECT
SXCI.ITEM_NAME AS BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
COALESCE(SXCI.SOFTWARE_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,
SXCI.ITEM_ID   AS SK_ITEM_ID_INT, 
SXCI.REQUESTED_DATE AS ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
SXCI.ITEM_APPROVED_DATE AS ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
COALESCE(SXCI.GENUINE_MISMATCH,'N') AS GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
COALESCE(SXCI.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SXCI.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLAG,'N') AS MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
SXCI.FCS_DATE AS FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT,
(CASE WHEN SXCI.DEACTIVATED_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
SXCI.ITEM_DESCRIPTION  AS ITEM_DESCR,
(CASE WHEN SXCI.ITEM_FLAG ='C' THEN 'PART' 
  WHEN SXCI.ITEM_FLAG ='P' THEN 'PRODUCT' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS ITEM_TYPE,
SXCI.SOURCE1 AS BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD, 
COALESCE(NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,  
COALESCE(NCWP3.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
COALESCE(NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
(CASE WHEN NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = 'C' THEN TRIM(TRAILING '-' FROM COALESCE(PT_CC,'UNKNOWN')) ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS RU_ITEM_CLASS_CD,
COALESCE(SXCI.DEACTIVATED_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
COALESCE(SXCI.CUSTOM_KIT_FLAG ,'N')  AS RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG,
(CASE WHEN NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = 'P' THEN COALESCE(PT_CC,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS RU_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID, 
CREATE_DATETIME  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
COALESCE(REQUESTOR,'UNKNOWN')  AS SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME,
COALESCE(ITEM_APPROVER,'UNKNOWN')  AS SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME,
COALESCE(SXCI.BASE_PID,'UNKNOWN')  AS RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
COALESCE(NGIT.BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD ,
COALESCE(NIT.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE  ,
COALESCE(CASE INDEX(SUBSTR(SXCI.BASE_PID,INDEX(SXCI.BASE_PID,'-') +1) ,'-') 
WHEN 0 THEN SXCI.BASE_PID 
ELSE SUBSTR(SXCI.BASE_PID,1,
INDEX(SUBSTR(SXCI.BASE_PID,INDEX(SXCI.BASE_PID,'-') +1) ,'-') 
+ INDEX(SXCI.BASE_PID,'-') -1
			) END,'UNKNOWN'
		)  AS DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
(CASE INDEX(SUBSTR(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,INDEX(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,'-') +1) ,'-') 
 WHEN 0 THEN SXCI.ITEM_NAME 
 ELSE SUBSTR(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,1,INDEX(SUBSTR(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,INDEX(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,'-') +1) ,'-') + INDEX(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,'-') -1) 
 END) AS RU_DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
'N' AS ENTERPRISE_MERGED_FLG,
COALESCE(SXCI.MANUAL_IMP_FLAG,'N' ) AS MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
COALESCE(NCIS.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
COALESCE(SXCI.PID_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_STATUS_CD ,
COALESCE(SXCI.AUDIT_FLAG,'N') AS AUDIT_FLG ,
COALESCE(SXCI.GPL_FLAG,'N') AS GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG ,
COALESCE(SXCI.LINE_OF_BUSINESS,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD ,
COALESCE(SXCI.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLAG,'N') AS KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
COALESCE(SXCI.DASHBOARD_FLAG,'N') AS  DASHBOARD_FLG ,
COALESCE(SXCI.REASON,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD ,
COALESCE(SXCI.REMOVED_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01') AS ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
COALESCE(SXCI.DELIVERY_OPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
CAST(SXCI.CREATED_DATE as date) AS DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
COALESCE(SXCI.WORKBENCH_FLAG,'N') AS WORKBENCH_FLG,
				SXCI.CREATED_DATE AS SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,			     
				SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE AS SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
			cast(SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE as date)  AS  DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
				COALESCE(SXCI.MODIFIED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
				COALESCE(SXCI.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
				CAST(SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as START_TV_DTM

FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS  SXCI

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2
  ON COALESCE(SXCI.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID,-999)  = NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS
  ON COALESCE(SXCI.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,-999) = NCIS.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
  ON (NCWP1.CEC_ID = SXCI.DEACTIVATED_BY)  

LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
  ON (NCWP2.CEC_ID = SXCI.ITEM_APPROVER)  

LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3
  ON (NCWP3.CEC_ID = SXCI.REQUESTOR)  

LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_TYPE NIT 
  ON (COALESCE(SXCI.ITEM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')=NIT.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE)

LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM_TYPE NGIT 
	  ON (COALESCE(SXCI.ITEM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')=NGIT.BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD)

LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM NGI
  ON (COALESCE(SXCI.BASE_PID,'UNKNOWN') = NGI.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SOURCE_SYSTEM NCISS
   ON  (  SXCI.SOURCE1 = NCISS.BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD )

LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT GTC_PART_CLASS_CD AS GTC_PKEY , 'C' PRODUCT_FLAG 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_PART_CLASS
UNION ALL
SELECT GTC_PRODUCT_TYPE_CD  AS GTC_PKEY , 'P' PRODUCT_FLAG 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_PRODUCT_TYPE
) NGP
ON ( ( CASE WHEN NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = 'P'  THEN COALESCE(PT_CC,'UNKNOWN') 
WHEN NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = 'C'  THEN TRIM(TRAILING '-' FROM COALESCE(PT_CC,'UNKNOWN')) END) = NGP.GTC_PKEY 
 AND NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = SXCI.ITEM_FLAG
   )

WHERE SOURCE1 <> 'CISCO'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SXCI.ITEM_NAME ORDER BY SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE DESC) = 1

UNION  ALL

SELECT
SXCI.ITEM_NAME AS BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
COALESCE(SXCI.SOFTWARE_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,
SXCI.ITEM_ID AS SK_ITEM_ID_INT, 
SXCI.REQUESTED_DATE AS ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
SXCI.ITEM_APPROVED_DATE AS ITEM_APPROVED_DT,
COALESCE(SXCI.GENUINE_MISMATCH,'N') AS GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
COALESCE(SXCI.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SXCI.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLAG,'N') AS MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
SXCI.FCS_DATE AS FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT,
(CASE WHEN SXCI.DEACTIVATED_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
SXCI.ITEM_DESCRIPTION  AS ITEM_DESCR,
(CASE WHEN SXCI.ITEM_FLAG ='C' THEN 'PART' 
  WHEN SXCI.ITEM_FLAG ='P' THEN 'PRODUCT' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS ITEM_TYPE,
SXCI.SOURCE1 AS BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD,  
COALESCE(NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP3.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
(CASE WHEN NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = 'C' THEN TRIM(TRAILING '-' FROM COALESCE(PT_CC,'UNKNOWN')) ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS RU_ITEM_CLASS_CD,
COALESCE(SXCI.DEACTIVATED_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT,
COALESCE(SXCI.CUSTOM_KIT_FLAG ,'N')  AS RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG,
(CASE WHEN NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = 'P' THEN COALESCE(PT_CC,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS RU_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID, 
CREATE_DATETIME  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
COALESCE(REQUESTOR,'UNKNOWN')  AS SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME  ,
COALESCE(ITEM_APPROVER,'UNKNOWN')  AS SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME   ,
COALESCE(SXCI.BASE_PID,'UNKNOWN')  AS RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
COALESCE(NGIT.BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD ,
COALESCE(NIT.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE  ,
COALESCE(CASE INDEX(SUBSTR(SXCI.BASE_PID,INDEX(SXCI.BASE_PID,'-') +1) ,'-') 
WHEN 0 THEN SXCI.BASE_PID 
ELSE SUBSTR(SXCI.BASE_PID,1,
INDEX(SUBSTR(SXCI.BASE_PID,INDEX(SXCI.BASE_PID,'-') +1) ,'-') 
+ INDEX(SXCI.BASE_PID,'-') -1
			) END,'UNKNOWN'
		) AS DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
(CASE INDEX(SUBSTR(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,INDEX(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,'-') +1) ,'-') 
 WHEN 0 THEN SXCI.ITEM_NAME 
 ELSE SUBSTR(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,1,INDEX(SUBSTR(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,INDEX(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,'-') +1) ,'-') + INDEX(SXCI.ITEM_NAME,'-') -1) 
 END) AS RU_DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
'N' AS ENTERPRISE_MERGED_FLG,
COALESCE(SXCI.MANUAL_IMP_FLAG,'N' ) AS MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
COALESCE(NCIS.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
COALESCE(SXCI.PID_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_STATUS_CD ,
COALESCE(SXCI.AUDIT_FLAG,'N') AS AUDIT_FLG ,
COALESCE(SXCI.GPL_FLAG,'N') AS GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG ,
COALESCE(SXCI.LINE_OF_BUSINESS,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD ,
COALESCE(SXCI.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLAG,'N') AS KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
COALESCE(SXCI.DASHBOARD_FLAG,'N') AS  DASHBOARD_FLG ,
COALESCE(SXCI.REASON,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD ,
COALESCE(SXCI.REMOVED_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01') AS ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
COALESCE(SXCI.DELIVERY_OPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
CAST(SXCI.CREATED_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
COALESCE(SXCI.WORKBENCH_FLAG,'N') AS WORKBENCH_FLG,
				SXCI.CREATED_DATE AS SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,				
				SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE  AS SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
				CAST(SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE AS DATE) AS  DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
				COALESCE(SXCI.MODIFIED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
				COALESCE(SXCI.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
				CAST(SXCI.MODIFIED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as START_TV_DTM
 
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS_CUSTOMS  SXCI

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2
   ON COALESCE(SXCI.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID,-999)  = NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS
   ON COALESCE(SXCI.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,-999)= NCIS.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
   ON (NCWP1.CEC_ID = SXCI.DEACTIVATED_BY)  

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
   ON (NCWP2.CEC_ID = SXCI.ITEM_APPROVER)  

LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3
   ON (NCWP3.CEC_ID = SXCI.REQUESTOR)  

LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_TYPE NIT 
   ON (COALESCE(SXCI.ITEM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')=NIT.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE)

LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM_TYPE NGIT 
   ON (COALESCE(SXCI.ITEM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')=NGIT.BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD)

LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM NGI
   ON (COALESCE(SXCI.BASE_PID,'UNKNOWN') = NGI.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SOURCE_SYSTEM NCISS
   ON  (  SXCI.SOURCE1 = NCISS.BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD )

LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT GTC_PART_CLASS_CD AS GTC_PKEY , 'C' PRODUCT_FLAG 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_PART_CLASS
UNION ALL
SELECT GTC_PRODUCT_TYPE_CD  AS GTC_PKEY , 'P' PRODUCT_FLAG 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_PRODUCT_TYPE
) NGP
ON ( ( CASE WHEN NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = 'P'  THEN COALESCE(PT_CC,'UNKNOWN') 
WHEN NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = 'C'  THEN TRIM(TRAILING '-' FROM COALESCE(PT_CC,'UNKNOWN')) END) = NGP.GTC_PKEY 
AND NGP.PRODUCT_FLAG = SXCI.ITEM_FLAG
   )
 
WHERE   SOURCE1 <> 'CISCO'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM, 
SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,
SK_ITEM_ID_INT,
ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
ITEM_APPROVED_DT, 
GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,
MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT, 
DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
ITEM_DESCR, 
ITEM_TYPE, 
BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD,  
ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
RU_ITEM_CLASS_CD, 
RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT, 
RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG, 
RU_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM as EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME, 
SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME,
RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,
DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
RU_DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
ENTERPRISE_MERGED_FLG,
MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
AUDIT_FLG,
GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,
LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,
KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
DASHBOARD_FLG,
REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,
ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
WORKBENCH_FLG,
SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
START_TV_DTM
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM_TV NICTV
			WHERE	END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
			AND EXISTS
			(
			SELECT 1
			FROM 
			(SELECT ITEM_NAME from $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS
			where SOURCE1 <> 'CISCO'
			UNION
			SELECT ITEM_NAME from $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_ITEMS_CUSTOMS
			where SOURCE1 <> 'CISCO'
			)SXCI)
	)TV_IN
	QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TV_IN.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM, TV_IN.START_TV_DTM ORDER BY TV_IN.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) = 1
		)TV_OUT
		LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM_TV NICTV
			ON ( TV_OUT.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = NICTV.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
			AND NICTV.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
	WHERE	TV_OUT.ROW_NUM = 1
	)TV
